description_long: This object consists of a cluster of six white, pom-pom-like flowers with densely layered petals, each perched atop a long, slender green stem. The petals are numerous, overlapping, and arranged in a radial, whorled fashion, giving the flower heads a full, rounded appearance. The stems are upright and straight, emerging from a base of broad, lanceolate leaves that are green with lighter variegated patterns. The leaves are arranged alternately along the lower portion of the stems, with some leaves arching outward and others pointing upward. The flower heads are slightly nodding, with some tilting to the side, and the centers of the flowers are subtly yellow. The overall composition suggests a decorative, ornamental plant suitable for urban parks, gardens, or landscaped sidewalks.
description: A cluster of six white, densely petaled flowers with yellow centers, each on a tall green stem and surrounded by broad, variegated green leaves. The flowers are full and rounded, with overlapping petals and upright stems.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cluster of six white flowers, with the layered petals and upright green stems clearly visible, and the variegated leaves fanning out at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded shape of the flower heads and the way some flowers tilt to the side, with the stems and leaves overlapping more distinctly.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backs of the flower heads and the arrangement of the leaves, with the petals appearing more densely packed from this angle.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the nodding orientation of some flowers and the layered structure of both petals and leaves, with stems crossing at the base.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a dense, radial, whorled configuration, with multiple layers overlapping concentrically around the center, creating a full, spherical flower head.
